title: Wire BLE NUS egress for bidirectional T-Deck LCI
description: Complete the BLE NUS SLIP local-client path by routing outbound IPv6 packets and CoAP replies back through ble_uart_send_slip() instead of only accepting BLE-originated ingress. Current code has ble_uart_send_slip(), but no caller, so T-Deck must not advertise CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BLE_LOCAL until this is implemented and smoke-tested. Acceptance: bidirectional packet path test or smoke evidence, generated config with CONFIG_LICHEN_HAS_BLE_LOCAL=y only after egress is wired, and app/client notes for UUIDs and framing.
